topic: Decimal division word problem, choosing correct expression
latex:
Nolan used $9.6$ grams of sugar in each loaf of bread he made. In all, he used $57.6$ grams of sugar. Which expression below represents how many loaves of bread Nolan made?

A. $57.6 \div 9.6$

B. $57.6 - 9.6$

C. $57.6 \times 9.6$

D. $57.6 + 9.6$
